title: CHILD AND FAMILY CENTER - 211info
text: UNIVERSITY OF OREGON HEDCO CLINIC CHILD AND FAMILY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mental health assessments and counseling services for children. Approach is family-centered, with special attention toward supporting parents as they learn to address the needs of their children. Services are provided by doctoral students in the second to fourth years of doctoral training in Counseling, School, or Clinical Psychology. 1655 Alder Street Suite 170 Eugene, OR 97403 Eligibility: Ages 2-18 Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-8pm, Friday 9am-7pm Email (541) 349-0923 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main (541) 349-0923 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Sliding scale fees: $0-$100 DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-8pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the south wing of the HEDCO building on the University of Oregon campus Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Child Guidance Mental Health Evaluation * Children Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - CENTER FOR HEALTHY RELATIONSHIPS HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - COMPREHENSIVE DIAGNOSTIC ASSESSMENT CLINIC HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SPEECH LANGUAGE AND HEARING CENTER MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COUNSELING PSYCHOLOGY CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UNIVERSITY OF OREGON HEDCO CLINIC
